name: retold-synth-databeacon
description: Synthetic data beacon — generates realistic, deterministic, on-demand record sets from declarative specs. A drop-in replacement for retold-databeacon as a source in operation graphs: same paginated REST surface, no real database behind it. Backed by fable's ExpressionParser + chance.js, seeded per cell so the same spec + seed always produces the same data.
author: Steven Velozo <steven@velozo.com> (http://velozo.com/)
